hero.title: Juan Manuel Torres

data.title: Data Analysis
data.desc: Mineral Exploration • GeoJSON • Data Visualization • Recharts

featured.title: 🌍 Featured Project: GEO-PLATFORM v3.0
featured.description: A comprehensive full-stack platform for geologists and mining professionals to explore, analyze, and visualize mineral exploration data in real-time. Includes interactive mapping, assay analysis, and geochemical pattern recognition.
featureList: 🗺️ Real-time drillhole locations with interactive React-Leaflet maps
📊 Assay data visualization with depth-grade relationships
📍 GeoJSON spatial analysis with PostGIS queries
🌙 Dark/Light mode toggle with persistent theming
📈 Interactive Recharts with Au (gold) grade rankings
🔍 Smart search & filter panel for drillhole discovery

geeApps.title: 🛰️ Google Earth Engine Applications
geeApps.description: Interactive applications for large-scale geospatial analysis using Google Earth Engine's cloud computing platform.
geeApps.app1: Highest-Points-of-Argentina-Glaciar-Hydro-DEM: 3D visualization of Andean peaks with glacier, hydrology, and geological structure layers. Interactive DEM exploration of 4,000+ meter elevations.
geeApps.app2: Cordobaengine: Analysis of Sierra Pampeanas topography with DEM models, surface hydrography, and geological formations.
geeApps.tech: Tech: JavaScript API, Landsat imagery, PostGIS geometry, Data Catalog

portfolio.title: 🌐 InsightLab Portfolio
portfolio.description: A portfolio website showcasing geospatial resources, scientific tools, and technological innovations in earth science.
resources: Gaia GPS: Precision mapping for outdoor activities & geosciences
Asterank & Galaxies: Space data exploration (600K+ asteroids)
Paleobiology Database: Fossil records and biodiversity research
portfolio.tech: Tech: HTML/CSS, Scientific communication, Data curation

geospatial.title: 🗺️ Geospatial Analysis
geospatial.desc: PostGIS, GDAL, GeoPandas, coordinate systems (EPSG:4326), spatial queries, geometric operations, GeoJSON formatting

mineral.title: 💰 Mineral Exploration
mineral.desc: Drillhole data modeling, assay analysis, grade estimation, domain interpretation, lithology/alteration/mineralization logging

architecture.title: 🏗️ Full-Stack Architecture
architecture.desc: Scalable API design, database optimization, responsive frontend, cloud deployment, production monitoring

database.title: 💾 Database Design
database.desc: Normalized schemas, UUID primary keys, interval-based modeling (numrange), EXCLUDE constraints, analytical views, query optimization

visualization.title: 📊 Data Visualization
visualization.desc: Interactive maps (Leaflet), charts (Recharts), dark mode theming, responsive design, real-time data updates

devops.title: ☁️ Cloud DevOps
devops.desc: Render deployment, Vercel CI/CD, Supabase management, environment configuration, auto-scaling
